# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Storage Account (must be globally unique, 3-24 lowercase alphanumeric)."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "Standard_GRS",
        "Standard_RAGRS",
        "Standard_ZRS",
        "Premium_LRS"
      ]
    },
    "kind": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "StorageV2",
      "allowedValues": [
        "StorageV2",
        "BlobStorage",
        "FileStorage"
      ]
    },
    "staticWebsiteIndexDocument": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "index.html"
    },
    "staticWebsiteErrorDocument404Path": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "404.html"
    },
    "additionalBlobContainers": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        {
          "name": "assets",
          "publicAccess": "Blob"
        }
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Additional blob containers to create besides the $web container."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "blobServiceName": "default"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "[parameters('kind')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": true,
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "accessTier": "Hot"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServiceName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {}
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServiceName'), '$web')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServiceName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "Blob"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServiceName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "isVersioningEnabled": false,
        "deleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": false
        },
        "restorePolicy": {
          "enabled": false
        },
        "containerDeleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": false
        },
        "cors": {
          "corsRules": []
        }
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "staticWebsite",
          "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
          "name": "default",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServiceName'), '$web')]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "indexDocument": "[parameters('staticWebsiteIndexDocument')]",
            "errorDocument404Path": "[parameters('staticWebsiteErrorDocument404Path')]"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServiceName'), parameters('additionalBlobContainers')[copyIndex()].name)]",
      "copy": {
        "name": "containersCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('additionalBlobContainers'))]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServiceName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "[parameters('additionalBlobContainers')[copyIndex()].publicAccess]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "primaryEndpoints": {
      "type": "object",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints]"
    },
    "webEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.web]"
    }
  }
}
